A.rationale: One focused clarifying question, enumerated real repo scripts plus concrete pain points; no premature file changes. Slightly long but signal-dense.

B.rationale: Took assumption-and-change path: sound logging upgrade, but rewrote app.py without stating which file/why; 5 turns, lecture-y failure note.

C.rationale: Tight focused clarifying question with real options and a paste-the-path escape hatch; no premature changes. Less pain-point detail than A.

notes: A and C both correctly clarify before acting; C is tighter for equal correctness. B made a reasonable but unilateral app.py rewrite without stating the assumption, using more turns.
